disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid onset over about two weeks of massive abdominal distension together with bilateral leg and ankle swelling
trigger_question_examples: How quickly did the swelling come on?
Where is the swelling and how long has it been building up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's really come up over the last two weeks — my belly has blown up huge and tight and my legs and ankles are all puffy. It's got worse fast.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness that is markedly worse lying flat and eased by sitting upright; needs three pillows / the recliner to breathe
trigger_question_examples: Is your breathing worse when you lie down?
What helps you breathe more easily?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't lie flat at all — as soon as I do I can't get a breath. I have to sit up in the recliner propped on pillows just to breathe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A dull ache in the upper right side of the abdomen, with long-standing fatigue and mild 'brain fog'
trigger_question_examples: Any pain or discomfort in your tummy?
How have you been feeling in yourself over the past months?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dull ache up under my right ribs that's been there a while. And honestly I've been wiped out tired for ages and a bit foggy in the head — I thought it was just my age.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of brief intravenous drug use about 30 years ago; never screened or tested for blood-borne viruses
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever injected any drugs, even once, in the past?
Have you ever been tested for hepatitis or other blood-borne viruses?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I did use IV drugs for a short time back in my early twenties, about 30 years ago — nothing since. I've never been tested for any of that.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: That was a long time ago and it's not something I really talk about.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No vomiting of blood and no black, tarry or bloody stools at present
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited any blood or anything that looks like coffee grounds?
Have your stools been black, tarry or bloody?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't thrown up any blood and my stools haven't been black or bloody.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, shivers or rigors reported
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or shivering?
Do you feel hot and unwell with it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't had any fevers or shivers that I've noticed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new confusion, drowsiness or disorientation noted by the patient or partner beyond the long-standing mild fogginess
trigger_question_examples: Has she seemed newly confused, drowsy or hard to rouse?
Any sudden change in her thinking or alertness in the last day or two?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No sudden change — she's her usual self, maybe a bit tired, but no worse confusion than the foggy feeling she's had for ages.
